parameter.name: logon_script
parameter.description: A script that will execute every time a user logs on. Two environment variables are set: \fBUSERNAME\fR, and \fBACCESS_TOKEN\fR. The \fBACCESS_TOKEN\fR environment variable is an access token for the MS Graph. The token scope config option sets the comma-separated scopes that should be requested for the \fBACCESS_TOKEN\fR. \fBACCESS_TOKEN\fR will be empty during offline logon. The return code of the script determines how authentication proceeds. 0 is success, 1 is a soft failure and authentication will proceed, while 2 is a hard failure causing authentication to fail.
